title: astragalus nuttallii
intro: Astragalus nuttallii, also known as White Milk Vetch or Nootka Milk Vetch, is a perennial legume native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been shown to have immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nuttallii are said to include antioxidant, anti-aging, and adaptogenic properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being. Astragalus nuttallii is often prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tincture form, or made into teas and infusions for its medicinal benefits.
